settings.title: BKM Harmonized helps support your natural hormonal balance and overall well-being. With its blend of carefully selected ingredients, it aids in managing stress while maintaining optimal muscle health.
Pre-order now, orders will be shipped out by July 15th at the latest.

settings.accordion_text:
Ashwagandha: Traditionally used to help the body manage stress and promote relaxation.

Probiotics: Support gut health and overall well-being.

Essential Amino Acids: Help maintain muscle health, especially during high hormonal phases for women.

Magnesium-Glycinate: Known for its calming properties and support of muscle and nerve function.

Emodin: A natural extract included for its potential support of hormonal balance.

NAC (N-Acetyl Cysteine): Supports antioxidant production and overall cellular health.
Feel the compounding effects of our ingredients over time by coming into routine and using it regularly. All BKM products are focused on both short term and long term benefits.

settings.title: Cologne List® certified
settings.text: BKM Tranquil has been tested for selected doping substances within the scope of the Cologne List® - without any complaints

settings.title: Balanced Wellness
settings.description:
Support muscle health
Harmonized includes essential amino acids that contribute to the maintenance of muscle health, particularly during periods of hormonal change. These nutrients help support your muscles, keeping them strong and resilient.

Natural hormonal balance
Our carefully selected natural plant extracts are included to support your body's natural hormonal balance. These extracts are chosen for their traditional use and existing scientific studies.

Stress reduction and cortisol balance
Harmonized includes ingredients traditionally used to support the body’s response to stress and help maintain balanced cortisol levels. This supports your overall sense of well-being and calm.

settings.title: Who Is Harmonized For?
settings.content:
For Women in 18-30s
Supporting Muscle and Energy

During these active years, it's important to get enough amino acids, B vitamins, and magnesium to support muscle development and energy. Harmonized’s blend of amino acids, adaptogens, and vitamins helps maintain lean muscle and supports the body's natural hormone phases.  

‎

For Women in Their 40s-50s
Navigating Perimenopause

As estrogen levels decrease, changes in muscle and fat distribution can occur. Our formula combines essential amino acids with adaptogens to help preserve muscle, support bone health, and balance the body through hormonal changes.  

‎

For Women 60 and Beyond
Supporting Muscle and Bone Health

Post-menopause, it’s important to maintain muscle and bone health. Our unique blend of amino acids, adaptogens, vitamins & minerals supports stress management and helps the body cope with hormonal fluctuations during this stage of life.

settings.title: Support muscle health
settings.text: Harmonized includes essential amino acids that contribute to the maintenance of muscle health, particularly during periods of hormonal change. These nutrients help support your muscles, keeping them strong and resilient.

settings.title: Natural hormonal balance
settings.text: Our carefully selected natural plant extracts are included to support your body's natural hormonal balance. These extracts are chosen for their traditional use and existing scientific studies.

settings.title: Stress reduction and cortisol balance
settings.text: Harmonized includes ingredients traditionally used to support the body’s response to stress and help maintain balanced cortisol levels. This supports your overall sense of well-being and calm.
Formulated on what actually works for women
Most supplements are formulated based on men, even if they are for women.
BKM Harmonized is different; it’s formulated on what actually works for women.

BKM supplements are formulated with a variety of ingredients, each chosen for their specific bioactive properties that address different biological needs in the human body. All BKM supplements are created in Sweden.

settings.title: Created by Li, Swedish champion in free diving
settings.description: The Nordic free dive champion Li Karlsén is the co-founder, maker, and user of all BKM supplements. Her history and experiences laid the foundation for Harmonized. She aimed to create a supplement specifically designed for women, whether they aspire to excel in their sport, feel their best, or have the energy to care for their children.

settings.title: Can I split the capsule?
settings.text: Yes, you can split the capsule. Simply open the capsule and mix the contents with your preferred food or beverage.

settings.title: Heading
settings.text: Use this text block to discuss some commonly asked questions like shipping and returns, sizing, warranties, or product and company details.

settings.title: Can I take the supplement if I use medication?
settings.text: These supplements often work well with medications but could sometimes cause interactions. It is important to consult with your healthcare provider before use.

settings.title: Can I take the supplement if pregnant or breastfeeding?
settings.text: It is not recommended for children and pregnant or breastfeeding women to take this supplement. Please consult with your healthcare provider before use.
